Who We Are

Masters of Metal.
Artisans of Security.

Oluwaseyi Limited Industry (OLI) is a premier steel fabrication company specializing in bespoke gates, security doors, and custom iron works. Every piece we craft is a testament to precision engineering and artistic craftsmanship.

From elegant residential gates to heavy-duty industrial doors, we deliver solutions that combine uncompromising security with breathtaking design. Our work speaks for itself.

100% Custom Design
Premium Steel Grade
Anti-Rust Coating
Fast Turnaround
Installation Included
Warranty Guaranteed
What We Offer

Our Services

🚪
Security Doors

Armoured entry doors for homes and businesses. Custom panels, glass inserts, and premium locking systems.

⚙️
Compound Gates

Sliding and swing gates for compounds. Laser-cut designs, decorative motifs, and powder-coat finishes.

🏗️
Burglary Proofs

Window and door guards with ornamental patterns. Protection without sacrificing aesthetics.

✨
Custom Metal Art

Bespoke laser-cut decorative panels, railings, fences, and signature motifs for unique properties.

Our Promise

Why Choose OLI?

01
Precision Crafted

Every weld, every cut, every finish is executed with military-grade precision and attention to detail.

02
Custom Design

No two OLI pieces are the same. We build your vision from scratch with your unique requirements at heart.

03
Fast Delivery

We respect your timeline. Our experienced team delivers projects on schedule without compromising quality.

04
Durable Finish

Anti-rust treatment and premium powder coating ensure your OLI installation stays pristine for decades.
